name: FlowSheet
description: Professional debate flowing tool with support for WSDC, Asian Parl, and BP formats. Includes Alt-shortcuts and 4-team management.

name: ImageSplitter
description: Split images into perfect grids for social media carousels or printing. Features customizable row and column counts.

name: WebP Studio
description: Convert images to WebP format with advanced compression settings.

name: DebateTimer
description: A specialized countdown timer for competitive debate. Features presets for WSDC/Asian and BP speeches with automated bell alerts.

name: Magic List Converter
description: Instantly convert ordered lists to comma-separated text (CSV), or turn messy text into clean bullet points.

name: Case Converter
description: Instantly transform text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, snake_case, and more.

name: Character Roster
description: Beautiful interactive character sheet tracker. Manage HP, stats, and resources with dark mode support and persistence.

name: Arcane Tabletop
description: Minimalist Virtual Tabletop (VTT). Upload maps, place miniatures, and use Fog of War for immersive encounters.

name: Dungeon Printer
description: Print perfectly scaled battle maps and tokens. Automatic multi-page slicing and coin-sized token templates.

name: Lesson Extractor
description: Extract English 1 Teacher Notes modules from PDF or pasted text.
